description.value:
Appears as a simple spear with unusual pointed head forged from strange reddish ore of a meteorite that landed just outside Rome on June 13, 28 A.D. The forging was so difficult it broke the will of Rome's best smiths. True value known only to few generals who wielded it and guarded its secret. While the oak shaft has been replaced many times, the pointed head never breaks or dulls. Remarkably effective against armored enemies—deduct half the armor points (rounded down) from physical attacks. Considered enchanted weapon versus creatures immune to non-magical attacks. Many former owners died mysteriously in accidents, sudden illnesses, or foul play. Thieves always fail to steal it permanently. Mi-go have been sending thieves and assassins after it for over a century, desperately coveting the strange metal. They suspect the spear has a will of its own and doesn't want to fall into their claws.

TypeEnchanted Weapon
Used ByAnyone
EffectCuts through armor (reduces armor protection by half); enchanted weapon against creatures immune to mundane attacks; never breaks or dulls; meteorite-forged head blessed by Vulcan
description.keeper: Effect: Cuts through armor (reduces armor protection by half); enchanted weapon against creatures immune to mundane attacks; never breaks or dulls; meteorite-forged head blessed by Vulcan
